revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{warning |Articles about ethnic groups or similarly large human populations should not be illustrated by a [[photomontage]] or [[Wikipedia:Picture tutorial#Galleries|gallery of images]] of group members; see [[MOS:PEOPLEGALLERY]] }}{{High-use}} {{auto short description}} {{Lua|Module:Infobox|Module:InfoboxImage|Module:Check for unknown parameters}} == Syntax == === Basic usage === {{Parameter names example |group |native_name |image |image_alt |image_caption |total |total_year |total_source |total_ref={{{total_ref}}} |genealogy |regions |languages |religions |related_groups |footnotes }} {{Infobox ethnic group | group = | native_name = | native_name_lang = | image = | image_caption = | image_alt = | image_upright = | total = | total_year = | total_source = | total_ref = | genealogy = | regions = | languages = | religions = | related_groups = | footnotes = }} === Usage with detailed per-region population === {{Parameter names example |group |native_name |image |image_alt|image_caption |total |total_year |total_source |total_ref={{{total_ref}}}|total1 |total1_year |total1_source |total1_ref |genealogy |regions |languages |religions |related_groups |footnotes |region1 |pop1 |ref1={{{ref1}}} |region2 |pop2 |ref2={{{ref2}}} |region3 |pop3 |ref3={{{ref3}}} |pop4=............ |region33 |pop33 |ref33={{{ref33}}} }} {{Infobox ethnic group | group = | native_name = | native_name_lang = | image = | image_caption = | image_alt = | image_uprigh = | total = | total_year = | total_source = | total_ref = | total1 = | total1_year = | total1_source = | total1_ref = | genealogy = | regions = | region1 = | pop1 = | ref1 = | region2 = | pop2 = | ref2 = | region3 = | pop3 = | ref3 = | languages = | religions = | related_groups = | footnotes = }} == Example == {{Infobox ethnic group | group = Tajiks | native_name = {{lang|tgk|size=115%|تاجيک}} {{lang|tg|size=90%|Тоҷик}} | image = Thomas Edward Gordon Lake Victoria, Great Pamir, May 2nd, 1874.png | image_alt = Thomas Edward Gordon Lake Victoria, Great Pamir, May 2nd, 1874 | image_upright = 1.2 | population = {{circa}} 16.5 to 28.5 million | region1 = Afghanistan | pop1 = 8,400,000 | ref1 = [https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/afghanistan CIA - The World Factbook - Afghanistan] | region2 = Tajikistan | pop2 = 5,849,331 | ref2 = [https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/tajikistan CIA - The World Factbook - Tajikistan] | region3 = Uzbekistan | pop3 = {{Unbulleted list |class=nowrap | 1,365,356[https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/uzbekistan CIA - The World Factbook - Uzbekistan] | or 4,915,284[http://www.state.gov/g/drl/rls/hrrpt/1999/369.htm US Department of State Report] | or 11,000,000D. Carlson, ''Uzbekistan: Ethnic Composition and Discriminations'', [[:en:Harvard University|Harvard University]], August 2003. }} | region4 = Iran | pop4 = 1,700,000 | ref4 = | region5 = Pakistan | pop5 = 900,000 | ref5 = | region6 = Russia | pop6 = 500,000 | ref6 = | region7 = Germany | pop7 = 120,000 | ref7 = | region8 = United States | pop8 = 93,000 | ref8 = | region9 = Qatar | pop9 = 87,000 | ref9 = | region10 = China (PRC) | pop10 = 41,000 | ref10 = | region11 = Ukraine | pop11 = 419 | ref11 = [http://2001.ukrcensus.gov.ua/results/nationality_population/nationality_popul1/select_5/?botton=cens_db&box=5.1W&k_t=00&p=75&rz=1_1&rz_b=2_1%20%20%20&n_page=4 State statistics committee of Ukraine - National composition of population, 2001 census] (Ukrainian)[http://www.state.gov/g/drl/rls/hrrpt/1999/369.htm US Department of State Report]D. Carlson, ''"Uzbekistan: Ethnic Composition and Discriminations"'', [[:en:Harvard University|Harvard University]], August 2003 | languages = [[Persian language|Persian]] (varieties of [[Dari (Eastern Persian)|Dari]] and [[Tajik language|Tajik]]) | religions = [[:en:Islam|Islam]] (mostly [[Sunni]]) | related_groups = Other [[Iranian peoples]] | footnotes = ''Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet...''
{{reflist}} }} {{Infobox ethnic group | group = Tajiks | native_name = {{lang|tgk|size=115%|تاجيک}} {{lang|tg|size=90%|Тоҷик}} | image = Thomas Edward Gordon Lake Victoria, Great Pamir, May 2nd, 1874.png | image_alt = Thomas Edward Gordon Lake Victoria, Great Pamir, May 2nd, 1874 | image_upright = 1.2 | population = {{circa}} 16.5 to 28.5 million | region1 = Afghanistan | pop1 = 8,400,000 | ref1 = [https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/afghanistan CIA - The World Factbook - Afghanistan] | region2 = Tajikistan | pop2 = 5,849,331 | ref2 = [https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/tajikistan CIA - The World Factbook - Tajikistan] | region3 = Uzbekistan | pop3 = {{Unbulleted list |class=nowrap | 1,365,356[https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/uzbekistan CIA - The World Factbook - Uzbekistan] | or 4,915,284[http://www.state.gov/g/drl/rls/hrrpt/1999/369.htm US Department of State Report] | or 11,000,000D. Carlson, ''Uzbekistan: Ethnic Composition and Discriminations'', [[:en:Harvard University|Harvard University]], August 2003. }} | region4 = Iran | pop4 = 1,700,000 | ref4 = | region5 = Pakistan | pop5 = 900,000 | ref5 = | region6 = Russia | pop6 = 500,000 | ref6 = | region7 = Germany | pop7 = 120,000 | ref7 = | region8 = United States | pop8 = 93,000 | ref8 = | region9 = Qatar | pop9 = 87,000 | ref9 = | region10 = China (PRC) | pop10 = 41,000 | ref10 = | region11 = Ukraine | pop11 = 419 | ref11 = [http://2001.ukrcensus.gov.ua/results/nationality_population/nationality_popul1/select_5/?botton=cens_db&box=5.1W&k_t=00&p=75&rz=1_1&rz_b=2_1%20%20%20&n_page=4 State statistics committee of Ukraine - National composition of population, 2001 census] (Ukrainian)[http://www.state.gov/g/drl/rls/hrrpt/1999/369.htm US Department of State Report]D. Carlson, ''"Uzbekistan: Ethnic Composition and Discriminations"'', [[:en:Harvard University|Harvard University]], August 2003 | languages = [[Persian language|Persian]] (varieties of [[Dari (Eastern Persian)|Dari]] and [[Tajik language|Tajik]]) | religions = [[:en:Islam|Islam]] (mostly [[Sunni]]) | related_groups = Other [[Iranian peoples]] | footnotes = ''Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet...''
{{reflist}} }} {{clear right}} == Parameters == All parameters optional except ''group''. {| class="wikitable" ! Parameter !! Description |- |width="95px"| ''group'' || Name of the group (e.g., "Armenians"). |- | ''native_name'' || Name in local language. If more than one, separate using {{tl|Plain list}} |- | ''native_name_lang'' || [[List of ISO 639-2 codes|ISO 639-2 code]], e.g., "fr" for French. If more than one, use {{tl|lang}} instead |- | ''flag'' || To specify a flag image below the titlebar; see below for example. Please be cautious about using this: most ethnic groups do ''not'' have a strongly associated flag. |- | ''flag_border'' || set to no to suppress the thin border around the flag image. |- | ''flag_caption'' || Caption to be placed below flag (if used). |- | ''flag_alt'' || Alt caption to be placed on flag image, per [[WP:ACCIM]]. |- | ''image'' || To specify an image below the titlebar (or flag); see below for example. |- | ''image_caption'' || (or ''caption'') Caption to be placed below image (if used). |- | ''image_alt'' || Alt caption to be placed on image, per [[WP:ACCIM]]. |- | ''total'' || (or ''population'' or ''pop'') Worldwide population. |- | ''genealogy'' || Worldwide population under criteria, including assimilated diasporas (useful to distinguish from ''population'' for certain ethnicities). |- | ''regions'' || (or ''popplace'') To introduce and/or indicate regional populations. |- | ''tablehdr'' || Heading above list of regions (region1, region2, etc.). |- | ''region1'' || To list first region. Requires {{para|pop1}} or {{para|ref1}}. |- | ''pop1'' || To list population in first region. |- | ''ref1'' || To list footnote/s and/or URL/s for first region's information. |- | ''region2'' ||rowspan="3"| Ditto second region. |- | ''pop2'' |- | ''ref2'' |- | ...... || |- | ''region40'' ||rowspan="3"| Ditto fortiest (and, currently, last) region. |- | ''pop40'' |- | ''ref40'' |- | ''languages'' || (or ''langs'') List of languages spoken by group. |- | ''religions'' || (or ''rels'') List of group's religious affiliations. |- | ''related_groups'' || List of other ethnic groups related to the group. |- | ''footnotes'' || List of footnotes |} ===Example use of ''flag'' and ''image'' parameters=== {{smaller|(''flag'' and ''flag_caption'' for [[:en:Basque people|Basque people]], ''image'' and ''image_caption'' for [[Zulu people|Zulu]] people)}} |flag = Flag of the Basque Country.svg |flag_caption = The [[Ikurriña]], flag of the [[Basque Country]] |flag_alt = The Ikurriña, flag of the Basque Country |image = ZuluWarriors.jpg |image_caption = Zulu warriors (late nineteenth century) |image_alt = Zulu warriors (late nineteenth century) == Microformat == {{UF-hcard-org}} == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Infobox template for an ethnic group", "format": "{{_\n| ________________ = _\n}}\n", "params": { "group": { "label": "Name", "description": "The name of the ethnic group. Defaults to the page name if empty.", "type": "string", "example": "Armenians", "default": "{{PAGENAME}}", "suggested": true }, "native_name": { "label": "Native name", "description": "The name of the ethnic group in the local language. If there is more than one, enter each using the following templates: {{Plainlist|*{{lang|ISO 639-2 code (e.g., \"fr\")|First name}} *{{lang|ISO code|Second name}} etc.}}.", "type": "content", "suggested": true }, "native_name_lang": { "label": "Native name language code", "description": "ISO 639-2 code (e.g., \"fr\" for French) for the language of the native name, if there is only one. If there is more than one, use just the \"Native name\" parameter instead, following the instructions there.", "type": "line", "example": "fr", "suggested": true }, "flag": { "label": "Flag", "description": "A flag for the ethnic group", "type": "wiki-file-name" }, "flag_caption": { "label": "Flag caption", "description": "A caption for the flag", "type": "string" }, "rawimage": { "label": "raw image", "type": "wiki-file-name" }, "image": { "label": "Image", "type": "wiki-file-name" }, "image_caption": { "aliases": [ "caption" ], "label": "image caption" }, "population": { "aliases": [ "pop", "total", "total1" ], "label": "Population", "type": "number" }, "total_ref": {}, "genealogy": { "label": "Ethnic population", "description": "Population including ancestral descent", "type": "number" }, "total_year": {}, "total_source": { "label": "Population source", "description": "\"census\" or \"estimate\"", "example": "census", "type": "string" }, "total1_year": {}, "total1_source": {}, "total1_ref": {}, "total2_year": {}, "total2_source": {}, "total2": {}, "total2_ref": {}, "total3_year": {}, "total3_source": {}, "total3": {}, "total3_ref": {}, "popplace": {}, "regions": {}, "pop24": {}, "ref24": {}, "region25": {}, "pop25": {}, "ref25": {}, "region26": {}, "pop26": {}, "ref26": {}, "region27": {}, "pop27": {}, "ref27": {}, "region28": {}, "pop28": {}, "ref28": {}, "langs" ], "label": "Languages", "type": "string", "example": "[[:en:American English|American English]], [[Hebrew language|Hebrew]], [[Yiddish]], minority [[Ladino]]", "suggested": true }, "religions": { "aliases": [ "rels" ], "label": "Religions", "description": "Religions associated with the ethnic group", "type": "content", "example": "[[:en:Christianity|Christianity]] ([[Roman {{reflist}} }} {{clear right}} == Parameters == All parameters optional except ''group''. {| class="wikitable" ! Parameter !! Description |- |width="95px"| ''group'' || Name of the group (e.g., "Armenians"). |- | ''native_name'' || Name in local language. If more than one, separate using {{tl|Plain list}} |- | ''native_name_lang'' || [[:en:en:List of ISO 639-2 codes|ISO 639-2 code]], e.g., "fr" for French. If more than one, use {{tl|lang}} instead |- | ''flag'' || To specify a flag image below the titlebar; see below for example. Please be cautious about using this: most ethnic groups do ''not'' have a strongly associated flag. |- | ''flag_border'' || set to no to suppress the thin border around the flag image. |- | ''flag_caption'' || Caption to be placed below flag (if used). |- | ''flag_alt'' || Alt caption to be placed on flag image, per [[WP:ACCIM]]. |- | ''image'' || To specify an image below the titlebar (or flag); see below for example. |- | ''image_caption'' || (or ''caption'') Caption to be placed below image (if used). |- | ''image_alt'' || Alt caption to be placed on image, per [[WP:ACCIM]]. |- | ''total'' || (or ''population'' or ''pop'') Worldwide population. |- | ''genealogy'' || Worldwide population under criteria, including assimilated diasporas (useful to distinguish from ''population'' for certain ethnicities). |- | ''regions'' || (or ''popplace'') To introduce and/or indicate regional populations. |- | ''tablehdr'' || Heading above list of regions (region1, region2, etc.). |- | ''region1'' || To list first region. Requires {{para|pop1}} or {{para|ref1}}. |- | ''pop1'' || To list population in first region. |- | ''ref1'' || To list footnote/s and/or URL/s for first region's information. |- | ''region2'' ||rowspan="3"| Ditto second region. |- | ''pop2'' |- | ''ref2'' |- | ...... || |- | ''region40'' ||rowspan="3"| Ditto fortiest (and, currently, last) region. |- | ''pop40'' |- | ''ref40'' |- | ''languages'' || (or ''langs'') List of languages spoken by group. |- | ''religions'' || (or ''rels'') List of group's religious affiliations. |- | ''related_groups'' || List of other ethnic groups related to the group. |- | ''footnotes'' || List of footnotes |} ===Example use of ''flag'' and ''image'' parameters=== {{smaller|(''flag'' and ''flag_caption'' for [[:en:Basque people|Basque people]], ''image'' and ''image_caption'' for [[Zulu people|Zulu]] people)}} |flag = Flag of the Basque Country.svg |flag_caption = The [[Ikurriña]], flag of the [[Basque Country]] |flag_alt = The Ikurriña, flag of the Basque Country |image = ZuluWarriors.jpg |image_caption = Zulu warriors (late nineteenth century) |image_alt = Zulu warriors (late nineteenth century) == Microformat == {{UF-hcard-org}} == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Infobox template for an ethnic group", "format": "{{_\n| ________________ = _\n}}\n", "params": { "group": { "label": "Name", "description": "The name of the ethnic group. Defaults to the page name if empty.", "type": "string", "example": "Armenians", "default": "{{PAGENAME}}", "suggested": true }, "native_name": { "label": "Native name", "description": "The name of the ethnic group in the local language. If there is more than one, enter each using the following templates: {{Plainlist|*{{lang|ISO 639-2 code (e.g., \"fr\")|First name}} *{{lang|ISO code|Second name}} etc.}}.", "type": "content", "suggested": true }, "native_name_lang": { "label": "Native name language code", "description": "ISO 639-2 code (e.g., \"fr\" for French) for the language of the native name, if there is only one. If there is more than one, use just the \"Native name\" parameter instead, following the instructions there.", "type": "line", "example": "fr", "suggested": true }, "flag": { "label": "Flag", "description": "A flag for the ethnic group", "type": "wiki-file-name" }, "flag_caption": { "label": "Flag caption", "description": "A caption for the flag", "type": "string" }, "rawimage": { "label": "raw image", "type": "wiki-file-name" }, "image": { "label": "Image", "type": "wiki-file-name" }, "image_caption": { "aliases": [ "caption" ], "label": "image caption" }, "population": { "aliases": [ "pop", "total", "total1" ], "label": "Population", "type": "number" }, "total_ref": {}, "genealogy": { "label": "Ethnic population", "description": "Population including ancestral descent", "type": "number" }, "total_year": {}, "total_source": { "label": "Population source", "description": "\"census\" or \"estimate\"", "example": "census", "type": "string" }, "total1_year": {}, "total1_source": "religions": { "aliases": [ "rels" ], "label": "Religions", "description": "Religions associated with the ethnic group", "type": "content", "example": "[[:en:Christianity|Christianity]] ([[Roman Catholicism]] and [[Protestantism]]), minority [[:en:Judaism|Judaism]] and [[:en:Buddhism|Buddhism]]", "suggested": true }, "related_groups": { "aliases": [ "related" ], "label": "Related ethnic groups", "description": "Ethnic groups related to this group", "type": "content", "example": "[[:en:Americans|Americans]], [[:en:Canadians|Canadians]], [[:en:Han Chinese|Han Chinese]]", "suggested": true }, "related-c": {}, "footnotes": {}, "ref33": {}, "region33": {}, "pop33": {}, "image_alt": {}, "flag_alt": {} }, "paramOrder": [ "group", "native_name", "native_name_lang", "flag", revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{warning |Articles about ethnic groups or similarly large human populations should not be illustrated by a [[photomontage]] or [[Wikipedia:Picture tutorial#Galleries|gallery of images]] of group members; see [[MOS:PEOPLEGALLERY]] }}{{High-use}} {{auto short description}} {{Lua|Module:Infobox|Module:InfoboxImage|Module:Check for unknown parameters}} == Syntax == === Basic usage === {{Parameter names example |group |native_name |image |image_alt |image_caption |total |total_year |total_source |total_ref={{{total_ref}}} |genealogy |regions |languages |religions |related_groups |footnotes }} {{Infobox ethnic group | group = | native_name = | native_name_lang = | image = | image_caption = | image_alt = | image_upright = | total = | total_year = | total_source = | total_ref = | genealogy = | regions = | languages = | religions = | related_groups = | footnotes = }} === Usage with detailed per-region population === {{Parameter names example |group |native_name |image |image_alt|image_caption |total |total_year |total_source |total_ref={{{total_ref}}}|total1 |total1_year |total1_source |total1_ref |genealogy |regions |languages |religions |related_groups |footnotes |region1 |pop1 |ref1={{{ref1}}} |region2 |pop2 |ref2={{{ref2}}} |region3 |pop3 |ref3={{{ref3}}} |pop4=............ |region33 |pop33 |ref33={{{ref33}}} }} {{Infobox ethnic group | group = | native_name = | native_name_lang = | image = | image_caption = | image_alt = | image_uprigh = | total = | total_year = | total_source = | total_ref = | total1 = | total1_year = | total1_source = | total1_ref = | genealogy = | regions = | region1 = | pop1 = | ref1 = | region2 = | pop2 = | ref2 = | region3 = | pop3 = | ref3 = | languages = | religions = | related_groups = | footnotes = }} == Example == {{Infobox ethnic group | group = Tajiks | native_name = {{lang|tgk|size=115%|تاجيک}} {{lang|tg|size=90%|Тоҷик}} | image = Thomas Edward Gordon Lake Victoria, Great Pamir, May 2nd, 1874.png | image_alt = Thomas Edward Gordon Lake Victoria, Great Pamir, May 2nd, 1874 | image_upright = 1.2 | population = {{circa}} 16.5 to 28.5 million | region1 = Afghanistan | pop1 = 8,400,000 | ref1 = [https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/afghanistan CIA - The World Factbook - Afghanistan] | region2 = Tajikistan | pop2 = 5,849,331 | ref2 = [https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/tajikistan CIA - The World Factbook - Tajikistan] | region3 = Uzbekistan | pop3 = {{Unbulleted list |class=nowrap | 1,365,356[https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/uzbekistan CIA - The World Factbook - Uzbekistan] | or 4,915,284[http://www.state.gov/g/drl/rls/hrrpt/1999/369.htm US Department of State Report] | or 11,000,000D. Carlson, ''Uzbekistan: Ethnic Composition and Discriminations'', [[:en:Harvard University|Harvard University]], August 2003. }} | region4 = Iran | pop4 = 1,700,000 | ref4 = | region5 = Pakistan | pop5 = 900,000 | ref5 = | region6 = Russia | pop6 = 500,000 | ref6 = | region7 = Germany | pop7 = 120,000 | ref7 = | region8 = United States | pop8 = 93,000 | ref8 = | region9 = Qatar | pop9 = 87,000 | ref9 = | region10 = China (PRC) | pop10 = 41,000 | ref10 = | region11 = Ukraine | pop11 = 419 | ref11 = [http://2001.ukrcensus.gov.ua/results/nationality_population/nationality_popul1/select_5/?botton=cens_db&box=5.1W&k_t=00&p=75&rz=1_1&rz_b=2_1%20%20%20&n_page=4 State statistics committee of Ukraine - National composition of population, 2001 census] (Ukrainian)[http://www.state.gov/g/drl/rls/hrrpt/1999/369.htm US Department of State Report]D. Carlson, ''"Uzbekistan: Ethnic Composition and Discriminations"'', [[:en:Harvard University|Harvard University]], August 2003 | languages = [[Persian language|Persian]] (varieties of [[Dari (Eastern Persian)|Dari]] and [[Tajik language|Tajik]]) | religions = [[:en:Islam|Islam]] (mostly [[Sunni]]) | related_groups = Other [[Iranian peoples]] | footnotes = ''Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet...''
{{reflist}} }} {{Infobox ethnic group | group = Tajiks | native_name = {{lang|tgk|size=115%|تاجيک}} {{lang|tg|size=90%|Тоҷик}} | image = Thomas Edward Gordon Lake Victoria, Great Pamir, May 2nd, 1874.png | image_alt = Thomas Edward Gordon Lake Victoria, Great Pamir, May 2nd, 1874 | image_upright = 1.2 | population = {{circa}} 16.5 to 28.5 million | region1 = Afghanistan | pop1 = 8,400,000 | ref1 = [https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/afghanistan CIA - The World Factbook - Afghanistan] | region2 = Tajikistan | pop2 = 5,849,331 | ref2 = [https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/tajikistan CIA - The World Factbook - Tajikistan] | region3 = Uzbekistan | pop3 = {{Unbulleted list |class=nowrap | 1,365,356[https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/uzbekistan CIA - The World Factbook - Uzbekistan] | or 4,915,284[http://www.state.gov/g/drl/rls/hrrpt/1999/369.htm US Department of State Report] | or 11,000,000D. Carlson, ''Uzbekistan: Ethnic Composition and Discriminations'', [[:en:Harvard University|Harvard University]], August 2003. }} | region4 = Iran | pop4 = 1,700,000 | ref4 = | region5 = Pakistan | pop5 = 900,000 | ref5 = | region6 = Russia | pop6 = 500,000 | ref6 = | region7 = Germany | pop7 = 120,000 | ref7 = | region8 = United States | pop8 = 93,000 | ref8 = | region9 = Qatar | pop9 = 87,000 | ref9 = | region10 = China (PRC) | pop10 = 41,000 | ref10 = | region11 = Ukraine | pop11 = 419 | ref11 = [http://2001.ukrcensus.gov.ua/results/nationality_population/nationality_popul1/select_5/?botton=cens_db&box=5.1W&k_t=00&p=75&rz=1_1&rz_b=2_1%20%20%20&n_page=4 State statistics committee of Ukraine - National composition of population, 2001 census] (Ukrainian)[http://www.state.gov/g/drl/rls/hrrpt/1999/369.htm US Department of State Report]D. Carlson, ''"Uzbekistan: Ethnic Composition and Discriminations"'', [[:en:Harvard University|Harvard University]], August 2003 | languages = [[Persian language|Persian]] (varieties of [[Dari (Eastern Persian)|Dari]] and [[Tajik language|Tajik]]) | religions = [[:en:Islam|Islam]] (mostly [[Sunni]]) | related_groups = Other [[Iranian peoples]] | footnotes = ''Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet...''
{{reflist}} }} {{clear right}} == Parameters == All parameters optional except ''group''. {| class="wikitable" ! Parameter !! Description |- |width="95px"| ''group'' || Name of the group (e.g., "Armenians"). |- | ''native_name'' || Name in local language. If more than one, separate using {{tl|Plain list}} |- | ''native_name_lang'' || [[:en:en:List of ISO 639-2 codes|ISO 639-2 code]], e.g., "fr" for French. If more than one, use {{tl|lang}} instead |- | ''flag'' || To specify a flag image below the titlebar; see below for example. Please be cautious about using this: most ethnic groups do ''not'' have a strongly associated flag. |- | ''flag_border'' || set to no to suppress the thin border around the flag image. |- | ''flag_caption'' || Caption to be placed below flag (if used). |- | ''flag_alt'' || Alt caption to be placed on flag image, per [[WP:ACCIM]]. |- | ''image'' || To specify an image below the titlebar (or flag); see below for example. |- | ''image_caption'' || (or ''caption'') Caption to be placed below image (if used). |- | ''image_alt'' || Alt caption to be placed on image, per [[WP:ACCIM]]. |- | ''total'' || (or ''population'' or ''pop'') Worldwide population. |- | ''genealogy'' || Worldwide population under criteria, including assimilated diasporas (useful to distinguish from ''population'' for certain ethnicities). |- | ''regions'' || (or ''popplace'') To introduce and/or indicate regional populations. |- | ''tablehdr'' || Heading above list of regions (region1, region2, etc.). |- | ''region1'' || To list first region. Requires {{para|pop1}} or {{para|ref1}}. |- | ''pop1'' || To list population in first region. |- | ''ref1'' || To list footnote/s and/or URL/s for first region's information. |- | ''region2'' ||rowspan="3"| Ditto second region. |- | ''pop2'' |- | ''ref2'' |- | ...... || |- | ''region40'' ||rowspan="3"| Ditto fortiest (and, currently, last) region. |- | ''pop40'' |- | ''ref40'' |- | ''languages'' || (or ''langs'') List of languages spoken by group. |- | ''religions'' || (or ''rels'') List of group's religious affiliations. |- | ''related_groups'' || List of other ethnic groups related to the group. |- | ''footnotes'' || List of footnotes |} ===Example use of ''flag'' and ''image'' parameters=== {{smaller|(''flag'' and ''flag_caption'' for [[:en:Basque people|Basque people]], ''image'' and ''image_caption'' for [[Zulu people|Zulu]] people)}} |flag = Flag of the Basque Country.svg |flag_caption = The [[Ikurriña]], flag of the [[Basque Country]] |flag_alt = The Ikurriña, flag of the Basque Country |image = ZuluWarriors.jpg |image_caption = Zulu warriors (late nineteenth century) |image_alt = Zulu warriors (late nineteenth century) == Microformat == {{UF-hcard-org}} == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Infobox template for an ethnic group", "format": "{{_\n| ________________ = _\n}}\n", "params": { "group": { "label": "Name", "description": "The name of the ethnic group. Defaults to the page name if empty.", "type": "string", "example": "Armenians", "default": "{{PAGENAME}}", "suggested": true }, "native_name": { "label": "Native name", "description": "The name of the ethnic group in the local language. If there is more than one, enter each using the following templates: {{Plainlist|*{{lang|ISO 639-2 code (e.g., \"fr\")|First name}} *{{lang|ISO code|Second name}} etc.}}.", "type": "content", "suggested": true }, "native_name_lang": { "label": "Native name language code", "description": "ISO 639-2 code (e.g., \"fr\" for French) for the language of the native name, if there is only one. If there is more than one, use just the \"Native name\" parameter instead, following the instructions there.", "type": "line", "example": "fr", "suggested": true }, "flag": { "label": "Flag", "description": "A flag for the ethnic group", "type": "wiki-file-name" }, "flag_caption": { "label": "Flag caption", "description": "A caption for the flag", "type": "string" }, "rawimage": { "label": "raw image", "type": "wiki-file-name" }, "image": { "label": "Image", "type": "wiki-file-name" }, "image_caption": { "aliases": [ "caption" ], "label": "image caption" }, "population": { "aliases": [ "pop", "total", "total1" ], "label": "Population", "type": "number" }, "total_ref": {}, "genealogy": { "label": "Ethnic population", "description": "Population including ancestral descent", "type": "number" }, "total_year": {}, "total_source": { "label": "Population source", "description": "\"census\" or \"estimate\"", "example": "census", "type": "string" }, "total1_year": {}, "total1_source": {}, "total1_ref": {}, "total2_year": {}, "total2_source": {}, "total2": {}, "total2_ref": {}, "total3_year": {}, "total3_source": {}, "total3": {}, "total3_ref": {}, "popplace": {}, "regions": {}, "region1": {}, "tablehdr": {}, "pop_embed": {}, "pop1": {}, "ref1": {}, "region2": {}, "pop2": {}, "ref2": {}, "region3": {}, "pop3": {}, "ref3": {}, "region4": {}, "pop4": {}, "ref4": {}, "region5": "pop24": {}, "ref24": {}, "region25": {}, "pop25": {}, "ref25": {}, "region26": {}, "pop26": {}, "ref26": {}, "region27": {}, "pop27": {}, "ref27": {}, "region28": {}, "pop28": {}, "ref28": {}, "region29": {}, "pop29": {}, "ref29": {}, "region30": {}, "pop30": {}, "ref30": {}, "region31": {}, "pop31": {}, "ref31": {}, "region32": {}, "pop32": {}, "ref32": {}, "languages": { "aliases": [ "langs" ], "label": "Languages", "type": "string", "example": "[[:en:American English|American English]], [[Hebrew language|Hebrew]], [[:en:Yiddish|Yiddish]], minority [[Ladino]]", "suggested": true }, "religions": { "aliases": [ "rels" ], "label": "Religions", "description": "Religions associated with the ethnic group", "type": "content", "example": "[[:en:Christianity|Christianity]] {{reflist}} }} {{clear right}} == Parameters == All parameters optional except ''group''. {| class="wikitable" ! Parameter !! Description |- |width="95px"| ''group'' || Name of the group (e.g., "Armenians"). |- | ''native_name'' || Name in local language. If more than one, separate using {{tl|Plain list}} |- | ''native_name_lang'' || [[:en:en:List of ISO 639-2 codes|ISO 639-2 code]], e.g., "fr" for French. If more than one, use {{tl|lang}} instead |- | ''flag'' || To specify a flag image below the titlebar; see below for example. Please be cautious about using this: most ethnic groups do ''not'' have a strongly associated flag. |- | ''flag_border'' || set to no to suppress the thin border around the flag image. |- | ''flag_caption'' || Caption to be placed below flag (if used). |- | ''flag_alt'' || Alt caption to be placed on flag image, per [[WP:ACCIM]]. |- | ''image'' || To specify an image below the titlebar (or flag); see below for example. |- | ''image_caption'' || (or ''caption'') Caption to be placed below image (if used). |- | ''image_alt'' || Alt caption to be placed on image, per [[WP:ACCIM]]. |- | ''total'' || (or ''population'' or ''pop'') Worldwide population. |- | ''genealogy'' || Worldwide population under criteria, including assimilated diasporas (useful to distinguish from ''population'' for certain ethnicities). |- | ''regions'' || (or ''popplace'') To introduce and/or indicate regional populations. |- | ''tablehdr'' || Heading above list of regions (region1, region2, etc.). |- | ''region1'' || To list first region. Requires {{para|pop1}} or {{para|ref1}}. |- | ''pop1'' || To list population in first region. |- | ''ref1'' || To list footnote/s and/or URL/s for first region's information. |- | ''region2'' ||rowspan="3"| Ditto second region. |- | ''pop2'' |- | ''ref2'' |- | ...... || |- | ''region40'' ||rowspan="3"| Ditto fortiest (and, currently, last) region. |- | ''pop40'' |- | ''ref40'' |- | ''languages'' || (or ''langs'') List of languages spoken by group. |- | ''religions'' || (or ''rels'') List of group's religious affiliations. |- | ''related_groups'' || List of other ethnic groups related to the group. |- | ''footnotes'' || List of footnotes |} ===Example use of ''flag'' and ''image'' parameters=== {{smaller|(''flag'' and ''flag_caption'' for [[:en:Basque people|Basque people]], ''image'' and ''image_caption'' for [[Zulu people|Zulu]] people)}} |flag = Flag of the Basque Country.svg |flag_caption = The [[Ikurriña]], flag of the [[Basque Country]] |flag_alt = The Ikurriña, flag of the Basque Country |image = ZuluWarriors.jpg |image_caption = Zulu warriors (late nineteenth century) |image_alt = Zulu warriors (late nineteenth century) == Microformat == {{UF-hcard-org}} == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Infobox template for an ethnic group", "format": "{{_\n| ________________ = _\n}}\n", "params": { "group": { "label": "Name", "description": "The name of the ethnic group. Defaults to the page name if empty.", "type": "string", "example": "Armenians", "default": "{{PAGENAME}}", "suggested": true }, "native_name": { "label": "Native name", "description": "The name of the ethnic group in the local language. If there is more than one, enter each using the following templates: {{Plainlist|*{{lang|ISO 639-2 code (e.g., \"fr\")|First name}} *{{lang|ISO code|Second name}} etc.}}.", "type": "content", "suggested": true }, "native_name_lang": { "label": "Native name language code", "description": "ISO 639-2 code (e.g., \"fr\" for French) for the language of the native name, if there is only one. If there is more than one, use just the \"Native name\" parameter instead, following the instructions there.", "type": "line", "example": "fr", "suggested": true }, "flag": { "label": "Flag", "description": "A flag for the ethnic group", "type": "wiki-file-name" }, "flag_caption": { "label": "Flag caption", "description": "A caption for the flag", "type": "string" }, "rawimage": { "label": "raw image", "type": "wiki-file-name" }, "image": { "label": "Image", "type": "wiki-file-name" }, "image_caption": { "aliases": [ "caption" ], "label": "image caption" }, "population": { "aliases": [ "pop", "total", "total1" ], "label": "Population", "type": "number" }, "total_ref": {}, "genealogy": { "label": "Ethnic population", "description": "Population including ancestral descent", "type": {{Documentation subpage}} {{warning |Articles about ethnic groups or similarly large human populations should not be illustrated by a [[photomontage]] or [[Wikipedia:Picture tutorial#Galleries|gallery of images]] of group members; see [[MOS:PEOPLEGALLERY]] }}{{High-use}} {{auto short description}} {{Lua|Module:Infobox|Module:InfoboxImage|Module:Check for unknown parameters}} == Syntax == === Basic usage === {{Parameter names example |group |native_name |image |image_alt |image_caption |total |total_year |total_source |total_ref={{{total_ref}}} |genealogy |regions |languages |religions revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{warning |Articles about ethnic groups or similarly large human populations should not be illustrated by a [[photomontage]] or [[Wikipedia:Picture tutorial#Galleries|gallery of images]] of group members; see [[MOS:PEOPLEGALLERY]] }}{{High-use}} {{auto short description}} {{Lua|Module:Infobox|Module:InfoboxImage|Module:Check for unknown parameters}} == Syntax == === Basic usage === {{Parameter names example |group |native_name |image |image_alt |image_caption |total |total_year |total_source |total_ref={{{total_ref}}} |genealogy |regions |languages |religions |related_groups |footnotes }} {{Infobox ethnic group | group = | native_name = | native_name_lang = | image = | image_caption = | image_alt = | image_upright = | total = | total_year = | total_source = | total_ref = | genealogy = | regions = | languages = | religions = | related_groups = | footnotes = }} === Usage with detailed per-region population === {{Parameter names example |group |native_name |image |image_alt|image_caption |total |total_year |total_source |total_ref={{{total_ref}}}|total1 |total1_year |total1_source |total1_ref |genealogy |regions |languages |religions |related_groups |footnotes |region1 |pop1 |ref1={{{ref1}}} |region2 |pop2 |ref2={{{ref2}}} |region3 |pop3 |ref3={{{ref3}}} |pop4=............ |region33 |pop33 |ref33={{{ref33}}} }} {{Infobox ethnic group | group = | native_name = | native_name_lang = | image = | image_caption = | image_alt = | image_uprigh = | total = | total_year = | total_source = | total_ref = | total1 = | total1_year = | total1_source = | total1_ref = | genealogy = | regions = | region1 = | pop1 = | ref1 = | region2 = | pop2 = | ref2 = | region3 = | pop3 = | ref3 = | languages = | religions = | related_groups = | footnotes = }} == Example == {{Infobox ethnic group | group = Tajiks | native_name = {{lang|tgk|size=115%|تاجيک}} {{lang|tg|size=90%|Тоҷик}} | image = Thomas Edward Gordon Lake Victoria, Great Pamir, May 2nd, 1874.png | image_alt = Thomas Edward Gordon Lake Victoria, Great Pamir, May 2nd, 1874 | image_upright = 1.2 | population = {{circa}} 16.5 to 28.5 million | region1 = Afghanistan | pop1 = 8,400,000 | ref1 = [https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/afghanistan CIA - The World Factbook - Afghanistan] | region2 = Tajikistan | pop2 = 5,849,331 | ref2 = [https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/tajikistan CIA - The World Factbook - Tajikistan] | region3 = Uzbekistan | pop3 = {{Unbulleted list |class=nowrap | 1,365,356[https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/uzbekistan CIA - The World Factbook - Uzbekistan] | or 4,915,284[http://www.state.gov/g/drl/rls/hrrpt/1999/369.htm US Department of State Report] | or 11,000,000D. Carlson, ''Uzbekistan: Ethnic Composition and Discriminations'', [[:en:Harvard University|Harvard University]], August 2003. }} | region4 = Iran | pop4 = 1,700,000 | ref4 = | region5 = Pakistan | pop5 = 900,000 | ref5 = | region6 = Russia | pop6 = 500,000 | ref6 = | region7 = Germany | pop7 = 120,000 | ref7 = | region8 = United States | pop8 = 93,000 | ref8 = | region9 = Qatar | pop9 = 87,000 | ref9 = | region10 = China (PRC) | pop10 = 41,000 | ref10 = | region11 = Ukraine | pop11 = 419 | ref11 = [http://2001.ukrcensus.gov.ua/results/nationality_population/nationality_popul1/select_5/?botton=cens_db&box=5.1W&k_t=00&p=75&rz=1_1&rz_b=2_1%20%20%20&n_page=4 State statistics committee of Ukraine - National composition of population, 2001 census] (Ukrainian)[http://www.state.gov/g/drl/rls/hrrpt/1999/369.htm US Department of State Report]D. Carlson, ''"Uzbekistan: Ethnic Composition and Discriminations"'', [[:en:Harvard University|Harvard University]], August 2003 | languages = [[Persian language|Persian]] (varieties of [[Dari (Eastern Persian)|Dari]] and [[Tajik language|Tajik]]) | religions = [[:en:Islam|Islam]] (mostly [[Sunni]]) | related_groups = Other [[Iranian peoples]] | footnotes = ''Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet...''
{{reflist}} }} {{Infobox ethnic group | group = Tajiks | native_name = {{lang|tgk|size=115%|تاجيک}} {{lang|tg|size=90%|Тоҷик}} | image = Thomas Edward Gordon Lake Victoria, Great Pamir, May 2nd, 1874.png | image_alt = Thomas Edward Gordon Lake Victoria, Great Pamir, May 2nd, 1874 | image_upright = 1.2 | population = {{circa}} 16.5 to 28.5 million | region1 = Afghanistan | pop1 = 8,400,000 | ref1 = [https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/afghanistan CIA - The World Factbook - Afghanistan] | region2 = Tajikistan | pop2 = 5,849,331 | ref2 = [https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/tajikistan CIA - The World Factbook - Tajikistan] | region3 = Uzbekistan | pop3 = {{Unbulleted list |class=nowrap | 1,365,356[https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/uzbekistan CIA - The World Factbook - Uzbekistan] | or 4,915,284[http://www.state.gov/g/drl/rls/hrrpt/1999/369.htm US Department of State Report] | or 11,000,000D. Carlson, ''Uzbekistan: Ethnic Composition and Discriminations'', [[:en:Harvard University|Harvard University]], August 2003. }} | region4 = Iran | pop4 = 1,700,000 | ref4 = | region5 = Pakistan | pop5 = 900,000 | ref5 = | region6 = Russia | pop6 = 500,000 | ref6 = | region7 = Germany | pop7 = 120,000 | ref7 = | region8 = United States | pop8 = 93,000 | ref8 = | region9 = Qatar | pop9 = 87,000 | ref9 = | region10 = China (PRC) | pop10 = 41,000 | ref10 = | region11 = Ukraine | pop11 = 419 | ref11 = [http://2001.ukrcensus.gov.ua/results/nationality_population/nationality_popul1/select_5/?botton=cens_db&box=5.1W&k_t=00&p=75&rz=1_1&rz_b=2_1%20%20%20&n_page=4 State statistics committee of Ukraine - National composition of population, 2001 census] (Ukrainian)[http://www.state.gov/g/drl/rls/hrrpt/1999/369.htm US Department of State Report]D. Carlson, ''"Uzbekistan: Ethnic Composition and Discriminations"'', [[:en:Harvard University|Harvard University]], August 2003 | languages = [[Persian language|Persian]] (varieties of [[Dari (Eastern Persian)|Dari]] and [[Tajik language|Tajik]]) | religions = [[:en:Islam|Islam]] (mostly [[Sunni]]) | related_groups = Other [[Iranian peoples]] | footnotes = ''Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet...''
{{reflist}} }} {{clear right}} == Parameters == All parameters optional except ''group''. {| class="wikitable" ! Parameter !! Description |- |width="95px"| ''group'' || Name of the group (e.g., "Armenians"). |- | ''native_name'' || Name in local language. If more than one, separate using {{tl|Plain list}} |- | ''native_name_lang'' || [[:en:en:List of ISO 639-2 codes|ISO 639-2 code]], e.g., "fr" for French. If more than one, use {{tl|lang}} instead |- | ''flag'' || To specify a flag image below the titlebar; see below for example. Please be cautious about using this: most ethnic groups do ''not'' have a strongly associated flag. |- | ''flag_border'' || set to no to suppress the thin border around the flag image. |- | ''flag_caption'' || Caption to be placed below flag (if used). |- | ''flag_alt'' || Alt caption to be placed on flag image, per [[WP:ACCIM]]. |- | ''image'' || To specify an image below the titlebar (or flag); see below for example. |- | ''image_caption'' || (or ''caption'') Caption to be placed below image (if used). |- | ''image_alt'' || Alt caption to be placed on image, per [[WP:ACCIM]]. |- | ''total'' || (or ''population'' or ''pop'') Worldwide population. |- | ''genealogy'' || Worldwide population under criteria, including assimilated diasporas (useful to distinguish from ''population'' for certain ethnicities). |- | ''regions'' || (or ''popplace'') To introduce and/or indicate regional populations. |- | ''tablehdr'' || Heading above list of regions (region1, region2, etc.). |- | ''region1'' || To list first region. Requires {{para|pop1}} or {{para|ref1}}. |- | ''pop1'' || To list population in first region. |- | ''ref1'' || To list footnote/s and/or URL/s for first region's information. |- | ''region2'' ||rowspan="3"| Ditto second region. |- | ''pop2'' |- | ''ref2'' |- | ...... || |- | ''region40'' ||rowspan="3"| Ditto fortiest (and, currently, last) region. |- | ''pop40'' |- | ''ref40'' |- | ''languages'' || (or ''langs'') List of languages spoken by group. |- | ''religions'' || (or ''rels'') List of group's religious affiliations. |- | ''related_groups'' || List of other ethnic groups related to the group. |- | ''footnotes'' || List of footnotes |} ===Example use of ''flag'' and ''image'' parameters=== {{smaller|(''flag'' and ''flag_caption'' for [[:en:Basque people|Basque people]], ''image'' and ''image_caption'' for [[Zulu people|Zulu]] people)}} |flag = Flag of the Basque Country.svg |flag_caption = The [[Ikurriña]], flag of the [[Basque Country]] |flag_alt = The Ikurriña, flag of the Basque Country |image = ZuluWarriors.jpg |image_caption = Zulu warriors (late nineteenth century) |image_alt = Zulu warriors (late nineteenth century) == Microformat == {{UF-hcard-org}} == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Infobox template for an ethnic group", "format": "{{_\n| ________________ = _\n}}\n", "params": { "group": { "label": "Name", "description": "The name of the ethnic group. Defaults to the page name if empty.", "type": "string", "example": "Armenians", "default": "{{PAGENAME}}", "suggested": true }, "native_name": { "label": "Native name", "description": "The name of the ethnic group in the local language. If there is more than one, enter each using the following templates: {{Plainlist|*{{lang|ISO 639-2 code (e.g., \"fr\")|First name}} *{{lang|ISO code|Second name}} etc.}}.", "type": "content", "suggested": true }, "native_name_lang": { "label": "Native name language code", "description": "ISO 639-2 code (e.g., \"fr\" for French) for the language of the native name, if there is only one. If there is more than one, use just the \"Native name\" parameter instead, following the instructions there.", "type": "line", "example": "fr", "suggested": true }, "flag": { "label": "Flag", "description": "A flag for the ethnic group", "type": "wiki-file-name" }, "flag_caption": { "label": "Flag caption", "description": "A caption for the flag", "type": "string" }, "rawimage": { "label": "raw image", "type": "wiki-file-name" }, "image": { "label": "Image", "type": "wiki-file-name" }, "image_caption": { "aliases": [ "caption" ], "label": "image caption" }, "population": { "aliases": [ "pop", "total", "total1" ], "label": "Population", "type": "number" }, "total_ref": {}, "genealogy": { "label": "Ethnic population", "description": "Population including ancestral descent", "type": "number" }, "total_year": {}, "total_source": { "label": "Population source", "description": "\"census\" or \"estimate\"", "example": "census", "type": "string" }, "total1_year": {}, "total1_source": {}, "total1_ref": {}, "total2_year": {}, "total2_source": {}, "total2": {}, "total2_ref": {}, "total3_year": {}, "total3_source": {}, "total3": {}, "total3_ref": {}, "popplace": {}, "regions": {}, "region1": {}, "tablehdr": {}, "pop_embed": {}, "pop1": {}, "ref1": {}, "region2": {}, "pop2": {}, "ref2": {}, "region3": {}, "pop3": {}, "ref3": {}, "region4": {}, "pop4": {}, "ref4": {}, "region5": {}, "pop5": {}, "ref5": {}, "region6": {}, "pop6": {}, "ref6": {}, "region7": {}, "pop7": {}, "ref7": {}, "region8": {}, "pop8": {}, "ref8": {}, "region9": {}, "pop9": {}, "ref9": {}, "region10": {}, "pop10": {}, "ref10": {}, "region11": {}, "pop11": {}, "ref11": {}, "region12": {}, "pop12": {}, "ref12": {}, "region13": {}, "pop13": {}, "ref13": {}, "region14": {}, "pop14": {}, "ref14": {}, "ref19": {}, "region20": {}, "pop20": {}, "ref20": {}, "region21": {}, "pop21": {}, "ref21": {}, "region22": {}, "pop22": {}, "ref22": {}, "region23": {}, "pop23": {}, "ref23": {}, "region24": {}, "pop24": {}, "ref24": {}, "region25": {}, "pop25": {}, "ref25": {}, "region26": {}, "pop26": {}, "ref26": {}, "region27": {}, "pop27": {}, "ref27": {}, "region28": {}, "pop28": {}, "ref28": {}, "region29": {}, "pop29": {}, "ref29": {}, "region30": {}, "pop30": {}, "ref30": {}, "region31": {}, "pop31": {}, "ref31": {}, "region32": {}, "pop32": {}, "ref32": {}, "languages": { "aliases": [ "langs" ], "label": "Languages", "type": "string", "example": "[[:en:American English|American English]], [[Hebrew language|Hebrew]], [[:en:Yiddish|Yiddish]], minority [[Ladino]]", "suggested": true }, "religions": { "aliases": [ "rels" ], "label": "Religions", "description": "Religions associated with the ethnic group", "type": "content", "example": "[[:en:Christianity|Christianity]] ([[:en:Roman Catholicism|Roman Catholicism]] and [[Protestantism]]), minority [[:en:Judaism|Judaism]] and [[:en:Buddhism|Buddhism]]", "suggested": true }, "related_groups": { "aliases": [ "related" ], "label": "Related ethnic groups", "description": "Ethnic groups related to this group", "type": "content", "example": "[[:en:Americans|Americans]], [[:en:Canadians|Canadians]], [[:en:Han Chinese|Han Chinese]]", "suggested": true }, "related-c": {}, "footnotes": {}, "ref33": {}, "region33": {}, "pop33": {}, "image_alt": {}, "flag_alt": {} }, "paramOrder": [ "group", "native_name", "native_name_lang", "flag", "flag_caption", "flag_alt", "rawimage", "image", "image_caption", "image_alt", "population", "total_ref", "genealogy", "total_year", "total_source", "total1_year", {{reflist}} }} {{clear right}} == Parameters == All parameters optional except ''group''. {| class="wikitable" ! Parameter !! Description |- |width="95px"| ''group'' || Name of the group (e.g., "Armenians"). |- | ''native_name'' || Name in local language. If more than one, separate using {{tl|Plain list}} |- | ''native_name_lang'' || [[:en:en:List of ISO 639-2 codes|ISO 639-2 code]], e.g., "fr" for French. If more than one, use {{tl|lang}} instead |- | ''flag'' || To specify a flag image below the titlebar; see below for example. Please be cautious about using this: most ethnic groups do ''not'' have a strongly associated flag. |- | ''flag_border'' || set to no to suppress the thin border around the flag image. |- | ''flag_caption'' || Caption to be placed below flag (if used). |- | ''flag_alt'' || Alt caption to be placed on flag image, per [[WP:ACCIM]]. |- | ''image'' || To specify an image below the titlebar (or flag); see below for example. |- | ''image_caption'' || (or ''caption'') Caption to be placed below image (if used). |- | ''image_alt'' || Alt caption to be placed on image, per [[WP:ACCIM]]. |- | ''total'' || (or ''population'' or ''pop'') Worldwide population. |- | ''genealogy'' || Worldwide population under criteria, including assimilated diasporas (useful to distinguish from ''population'' for certain ethnicities). |- | ''regions'' || (or ''popplace'') To introduce and/or indicate regional populations. |- | ''tablehdr'' || Heading above list of regions (region1, region2, etc.). |- | ''region1'' || To list first region. Requires {{para|pop1}} or {{para|ref1}}. |- | ''pop1'' || To list population in first region. |- | ''ref1'' || To list footnote/s and/or URL/s for first region's information. |- | ''region2'' ||rowspan="3"| Ditto second region. |- | ''pop2'' |- | ''ref2'' |- | ...... || |- | ''region40'' ||rowspan="3"| Ditto fortiest (and, currently, last) region. |- | ''pop40'' |- | ''ref40'' |- | ''languages'' || (or ''langs'') List of languages spoken by group. |- | ''religions'' || (or ''rels'') List of group's religious affiliations. |- | ''related_groups'' || List of other ethnic groups related to the group. |- | ''footnotes'' || List of footnotes |} ===Example use of ''flag'' and ''image'' parameters=== {{smaller|(''flag'' and ''flag_caption'' for [[:en:Basque people|Basque people]], ''image'' and ''image_caption'' for [[Zulu people|Zulu]] people)}} |flag = Flag of the Basque Country.svg |flag_caption = The [[Ikurriña]], flag of the [[Basque Country]] |flag_alt = The Ikurriña, flag of the Basque Country |image = ZuluWarriors.jpg |image_caption = Zulu warriors (late nineteenth century) |image_alt = Zulu warriors (late nineteenth century) == Microformat == {{UF-hcard-org}} == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Infobox template for an ethnic group", "format": "{{_\n| ________________ = _\n}}\n", "params": { "group": { "label": "Name", "description": "The name of the ethnic group. Defaults to the page name if empty.", "type": "string", "example": "Armenians", "default": "{{PAGENAME}}", "suggested": true }, "native_name": { "label": "Native name", "description": "The name of the ethnic group in the local language. If there is more than one, enter each using the following templates: {{Plainlist|*{{lang|ISO 639-2 code (e.g., \"fr\")|First name}} *{{lang|ISO code|Second name}} etc.}}.", "type": "content", "suggested": true }, "native_name_lang": { "label": "Native name language code", "description": "ISO 639-2 code (e.g., \"fr\" for French) for the language of the native name, if there is only one. If there is more than one, use just the \"Native name\" parameter instead, following the instructions there.", "type": "line", "example": "fr", "suggested": true }, "flag": { "label": "Flag", "description": "A flag for the ethnic group", "type": "wiki-file-name" }, "flag_caption": { "label": "Flag caption", "description": "A caption for the flag", "type": "string" }, "rawimage": { "label": "raw image", "type": "wiki-file-name" }, "image": { "label": "Image", "type": "wiki-file-name" }, "image_caption": { "aliases": [ "caption" ], "label": "image caption" }, "population": { "aliases": [ {{Documentation subpage}} {{warning |Articles about ethnic groups or similarly large human populations should not be illustrated by a [[photomontage]] or [[Wikipedia:Picture tutorial#Galleries|gallery of images]] of group members; see [[MOS:PEOPLEGALLERY]] }}{{High-use}} {{auto short description}} {{Lua|Module:Infobox|Module:InfoboxImage|Module:Check for unknown parameters}} == Syntax == === Basic usage === {{Parameter names example |group |native_name |image |image_alt |image_caption |total |total_year |total_source |total_ref={{{total_ref}}} |genealogy |regions |languages |religions revision.comment: Bot: wrap 8 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23460549766|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{warning |Articles about ethnic groups or similarly large human populations should not be illustrated by a [[photomontage]] or [[Wikipedia:Picture tutorial#Galleries|gallery of images]] of group members; see [[MOS:PEOPLEGALLERY]] }}{{High-use}} {{auto short description}} {{Lua|Module:Infobox|Module:InfoboxImage|Module:Check for unknown parameters}} == Syntax == === Basic usage === {{Parameter names example |group |native_name |image |image_alt |image_caption |total |total_year |total_source |total_ref={{{total_ref}}} |genealogy |regions |languages |religions |related_groups |footnotes }} {{Infobox ethnic group | group = | native_name = | native_name_lang = | image = | image_caption = | image_alt = | image_upright = | total = | total_year = | total_source = | total_ref = | genealogy = | regions = | languages = | religions = | related_groups = | footnotes = }} === Usage with detailed per-region population === {{Parameter names example |group |native_name |image |image_alt|image_caption |total |total_year |total_source |total_ref={{{total_ref}}}|total1 |total1_year |total1_source |total1_ref |genealogy |regions |languages |religions |related_groups |footnotes |region1 |pop1 |ref1={{{ref1}}} |region2 |pop2 |ref2={{{ref2}}} |region3 |pop3 |ref3={{{ref3}}} |pop4=............ |region33 |pop33 |ref33={{{ref33}}} }} {{Infobox ethnic group | group = | native_name = | native_name_lang = | image = | image_caption = | image_alt = | image_uprigh = | total = | total_year = | total_source = | total_ref = | total1 = | total1_year = | total1_source = | total1_ref = | genealogy = | regions = | region1 = | pop1 = | ref1 = | region2 = | pop2 = | ref2 = | region3 = | pop3 = | ref3 = | languages = | religions = | related_groups = | footnotes = }} == Example == {{Infobox ethnic group | group = Tajiks | native_name = {{lang|tgk|size=115%|تاجيک}} {{lang|tg|size=90%|Тоҷик}} | image = Thomas Edward Gordon Lake Victoria, Great Pamir, May 2nd, 1874.png | image_alt = Thomas Edward Gordon Lake Victoria, Great Pamir, May 2nd, 1874 | image_upright = 1.2 | population = {{circa}} 16.5 to 28.5 million | region1 = Afghanistan | pop1 = 8,400,000 | ref1 = [https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/afghanistan CIA - The World Factbook - Afghanistan] | region2 = Tajikistan | pop2 = 5,849,331 | ref2 = [https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/tajikistan CIA - The World Factbook - Tajikistan] | region3 = Uzbekistan | pop3 = {{Unbulleted list |class=nowrap | 1,365,356[https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/uzbekistan CIA - The World Factbook - Uzbekistan] | or 4,915,284[http://www.state.gov/g/drl/rls/hrrpt/1999/369.htm US Department of State Report] | or 11,000,000D. Carlson, ''Uzbekistan: Ethnic Composition and Discriminations'', [[:en:Harvard University|Harvard University]], August 2003. }} | region4 = Iran | pop4 = 1,700,000 | ref4 = | region5 = Pakistan | pop5 = 900,000 | ref5 = | region6 = Russia | pop6 = 500,000 | ref6 = | region7 = Germany | pop7 = 120,000 | ref7 = | region8 = United States | pop8 = 93,000 | ref8 = | region9 = Qatar | pop9 = 87,000 | ref9 = | region10 = China (PRC) | pop10 = 41,000 | ref10 = | region11 = Ukraine | pop11 = 419 | ref11 = [http://2001.ukrcensus.gov.ua/results/nationality_population/nationality_popul1/select_5/?botton=cens_db&box=5.1W&k_t=00&p=75&rz=1_1&rz_b=2_1%20%20%20&n_page=4 State statistics committee of Ukraine - National composition of population, 2001 census] (Ukrainian)[http://www.state.gov/g/drl/rls/hrrpt/1999/369.htm US Department of State Report]D. Carlson, ''"Uzbekistan: Ethnic Composition and Discriminations"'', [[:en:Harvard University|Harvard University]], August 2003 | languages = [[Persian language|Persian]] (varieties of [[Dari (Eastern Persian)|Dari]] and [[Tajik language|Tajik]]) | religions = [[:en:Islam|Islam]] (mostly [[Sunni]]) | related_groups = Other [[Iranian peoples]] | footnotes = ''Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet...''
{{reflist}} }} {{Infobox ethnic group | group = Tajiks | native_name = {{lang|tgk|size=115%|تاجيک}} {{lang|tg|size=90%|Тоҷик}} | image = Thomas Edward Gordon Lake Victoria, Great Pamir, May 2nd, 1874.png | image_alt = Thomas Edward Gordon Lake Victoria, Great Pamir, May 2nd, 1874 | image_upright = 1.2 | population = {{circa}} 16.5 to 28.5 million | region1 = Afghanistan | pop1 = 8,400,000 | ref1 = [https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/afghanistan CIA - The World Factbook - Afghanistan] | region2 = Tajikistan | pop2 = 5,849,331 | ref2 = [https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/tajikistan CIA - The World Factbook - Tajikistan] | region3 = Uzbekistan | pop3 = {{Unbulleted list |class=nowrap | 1,365,356[https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/uzbekistan CIA - The World Factbook - Uzbekistan] | or 4,915,284[http://www.state.gov/g/drl/rls/hrrpt/1999/369.htm US Department of State Report] | or 11,000,000D. Carlson, ''Uzbekistan: Ethnic Composition and Discriminations'', [[:en:Harvard University|Harvard University]], August 2003. }} | region4 = Iran | pop4 = 1,700,000 | ref4 = | region5 = Pakistan | pop5 = 900,000 | ref5 = | region6 = Russia | pop6 = 500,000 | ref6 = | region7 = Germany | pop7 = 120,000 | ref7 = | region8 = United States | pop8 = 93,000 | ref8 = | region9 = Qatar | pop9 = 87,000 | ref9 = | region10 = China (PRC) | pop10 = 41,000 | ref10 = | region11 = Ukraine | pop11 = 419 | ref11 = [http://2001.ukrcensus.gov.ua/results/nationality_population/nationality_popul1/select_5/?botton=cens_db&box=5.1W&k_t=00&p=75&rz=1_1&rz_b=2_1%20%20%20&n_page=4 State statistics committee of Ukraine - National composition of population, 2001 census] (Ukrainian)[http://www.state.gov/g/drl/rls/hrrpt/1999/369.htm US Department of State Report]D. Carlson, ''"Uzbekistan: Ethnic Composition and Discriminations"'', [[:en:Harvard University|Harvard University]], August 2003 | languages = [[Persian language|Persian]] (varieties of [[Dari (Eastern Persian)|Dari]] and [[Tajik language|Tajik]]) | religions = [[:en:Islam|Islam]] (mostly [[Sunni]]) | related_groups = Other [[Iranian peoples]] | footnotes = ''Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet...''
{{reflist}} }} {{clear right}} == Parameters == All parameters optional except ''group''. {| class="wikitable" ! Parameter !! Description |- |width="95px"| ''group'' || Name of the group (e.g., "Armenians"). |- | ''native_name'' || Name in local language. If more than one, separate using {{tl|Plain list}} |- | ''native_name_lang'' || [[:en:en:List of ISO 639-2 codes|ISO 639-2 code]], e.g., "fr" for French. If more than one, use {{tl|lang}} instead |- | ''flag'' || To specify a flag image below the titlebar; see below for example. Please be cautious about using this: most ethnic groups do ''not'' have a strongly associated flag. |- | ''flag_border'' || set to no to suppress the thin border around the flag image. |- | ''flag_caption'' || Caption to be placed below flag (if used). |- | ''flag_alt'' || Alt caption to be placed on flag image, per [[WP:ACCIM]]. |- | ''image'' || To specify an image below the titlebar (or flag); see below for example. |- | ''image_caption'' || (or ''caption'') Caption to be placed below image (if used). |- | ''image_alt'' || Alt caption to be placed on image, per [[WP:ACCIM]]. |- | ''total'' || (or ''population'' or ''pop'') Worldwide population. |- | ''genealogy'' || Worldwide population under criteria, including assimilated diasporas (useful to distinguish from ''population'' for certain ethnicities). |- | ''regions'' || (or ''popplace'') To introduce and/or indicate regional populations. |- | ''tablehdr'' || Heading above list of regions (region1, region2, etc.). |- | ''region1'' || To list first region. Requires {{para|pop1}} or {{para|ref1}}. |- | ''pop1'' || To list population in first region. |- | ''ref1'' || To list footnote/s and/or URL/s for first region's information. |- | ''region2'' ||rowspan="3"| Ditto second region. |- | ''pop2'' |- | ''ref2'' |- | ...... || |- | ''region40'' ||rowspan="3"| Ditto fortiest (and, currently, last) region. |- | ''pop40'' |- | ''ref40'' |- | ''languages'' || (or ''langs'') List of languages spoken by group. |- | ''religions'' || (or ''rels'') List of group's religious affiliations. |- | ''related_groups'' || List of other ethnic groups related to the group. |- | ''footnotes'' || List of footnotes |} ===Example use of ''flag'' and ''image'' parameters=== {{smaller|(''flag'' and ''flag_caption'' for [[:en:Basque people|Basque people]], ''image'' and ''image_caption'' for [[Zulu people|Zulu]] people)}} |flag = Flag of the Basque Country.svg |flag_caption = The [[Ikurriña]], flag of the [[Basque Country]] |flag_alt = The Ikurriña, flag of the Basque Country |image = ZuluWarriors.jpg |image_caption = Zulu warriors (late nineteenth century) |image_alt = Zulu warriors (late nineteenth century) == Microformat == {{UF-hcard-org}} == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Infobox template for an ethnic group", "format": "{{_\n| ________________ = _\n}}\n", "params": { "group": { "label": "Name", "description": "The name of the ethnic group. Defaults to the page name if empty.", "type": "string", "example": "Armenians", "default": "{{PAGENAME}}", "suggested": true }, "native_name": { "label": "Native name", "description": "The name of the ethnic group in the local language. If there is more than one, enter each using the following templates: {{Plainlist|*{{lang|ISO 639-2 code (e.g., \"fr\")|First name}} *{{lang|ISO code|Second name}} etc.}}.", "type": "content", "suggested": true }, "native_name_lang": { "label": "Native name language code", "description": "ISO 639-2 code (e.g., \"fr\" for French) for the language of the native name, if there is only one. If there is more than one, use just the \"Native name\" parameter instead, following the instructions there.", "type": "line", "example": "fr", "suggested": true }, "flag": { "label": "Flag", "description": "A flag for the ethnic group", "type": "wiki-file-name" }, "flag_caption": { "label": "Flag caption", "description": "A caption for the flag", "type": "string" }, "rawimage": { "label": "raw image", "type": "wiki-file-name" }, "image": { "label": "Image", "type": "wiki-file-name" }, "image_caption": { "aliases": [ "caption" ], "label": "image caption" }, "population": { "aliases": [ "pop", "total", "total1" ], "label": "Population", "type": "number" }, "total_ref": {}, "genealogy": { "label": "Ethnic population", "description": "Population including ancestral descent", "type": "number" }, "total_year": {}, "total_source": { "label": "Population source", "description": "\"census\" or \"estimate\"", "example": "census", "type": "string" }, "total1_year": {}, "total1_source": {}, "total1_ref": {}, "total2_year": {}, "total2_source": {}, "total2": {}, "total2_ref": {}, "total3_year": {}, "total3_source": {}, "total3": {}, "total3_ref": {}, "popplace": {}, "regions": {}, "region29": {}, "pop29": {}, "ref29": {}, "region30": {}, "pop30": {}, "ref30": {}, "region31": {}, "pop31": {}, "ref31": {}, "region32": {}, "pop32": {}, "ref32": {}, "languages": { "aliases": [ "langs" ], "label": "Languages", "type": "string", "example": "[[:en:American English|American English]], [[Hebrew language|Hebrew]], [[:en:Yiddish|Yiddish]], minority [[Ladino]]", "suggested": true }, "religions": { "aliases": [ "rels" ], "label": "Religions", "description": "Religions associated with the ethnic group", "type": "content", "example": "[[:en:Christianity|Christianity]] ([[:en:Roman Catholicism|Roman Catholicism]] and [[Protestantism]]), minority [[:en:Judaism|Judaism]] and [[:en:Buddhism|Buddhism]]", "suggested": true }, "related_groups": { "aliases": [ "related" ], {{reflist}} }} {{clear right}} == Parameters == All parameters optional except ''group''. {| class="wikitable" ! Parameter !! Description |- |width="95px"| ''group'' || Name of the group (e.g., "Armenians"). |- | ''native_name'' || Name in local language. If more than one, separate using {{tl|Plain list}} |- | ''native_name_lang'' || [[:en:en:List of ISO 639-2 codes|ISO 639-2 code]], e.g., "fr" for French. If more than one, use {{tl|lang}} instead |- | ''flag'' || To specify a flag image below the titlebar; see below for example. Please be cautious about using this: most ethnic groups do ''not'' have a strongly associated flag. |- | ''flag_border'' || set to no to suppress the thin border around the flag image. |- | ''flag_caption'' || Caption to be placed below flag (if used). |- | ''flag_alt'' || Alt caption to be placed on flag image, per [[WP:ACCIM]]. |- | ''image'' || To specify an image below the titlebar (or flag); see below for example. |- | ''image_caption'' || (or ''caption'') Caption to be placed below image (if used). |- | ''image_alt'' || Alt caption to be placed on image, per [[WP:ACCIM]]. |- | ''total'' || (or ''population'' or ''pop'') Worldwide population. |- | ''genealogy'' || Worldwide population under criteria, including assimilated diasporas (useful to distinguish from ''population'' for certain ethnicities). |- | ''regions'' || (or ''popplace'') To introduce and/or indicate regional populations. |- | ''tablehdr'' || Heading above list of regions (region1, region2, etc.). |- | ''region1'' || To list first region. Requires {{para|pop1}} or {{para|ref1}}. |- | ''pop1'' || To list population in first region. |- | ''ref1'' || To list footnote/s and/or URL/s for first region's information. |- | ''region2'' ||rowspan="3"| Ditto second region. |- | ''pop2'' |- | ''ref2'' |- | ...... || |- | ''region40'' ||rowspan="3"| Ditto fortiest (and, currently, last) region. |- | ''pop40'' |- | ''ref40'' |- | ''languages'' || (or ''langs'') List of languages spoken by group. |- | ''religions'' || (or ''rels'') List of group's religious affiliations. |- | ''related_groups'' || List of other ethnic groups related to the group. |- | ''footnotes'' || List of footnotes |} ===Example use of ''flag'' and ''image'' parameters=== {{smaller|(''flag'' and ''flag_caption'' for [[:en:Basque people|Basque people]], ''image'' and ''image_caption'' for [[Zulu people|Zulu]] people)}} |flag = Flag of the Basque Country.svg |flag_caption = The [[Ikurriña]], flag of the [[Basque Country]] |flag_alt = The Ikurriña, flag of the Basque Country |image = ZuluWarriors.jpg |image_caption = Zulu warriors (late nineteenth century) |image_alt = Zulu warriors (late nineteenth century) == Microformat == {{UF-hcard-org}} == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Infobox template for an ethnic group", "format": "{{_\n| ________________ = _\n}}\n", "params": { "group": { "label": "Name", "description": "The name of the ethnic group. Defaults to the page name if empty.", "type": "string", "example": "Armenians", "default": "{{PAGENAME}}", "suggested": true }, "native_name": { "label": "Native name", "description": "The name of the ethnic group in the local language. If there is more than one, enter each using the following templates: {{Plainlist|*{{lang|ISO 639-2 code (e.g., \"fr\")|First name}} *{{lang|ISO code|Second name}} etc.}}.", "type": "content", "suggested": true }, "native_name_lang": { "label": "Native name language code", "description": "ISO 639-2 code (e.g., \"fr\" for French) for the language of the native name, if there is only one. If there is more than one, use just the \"Native name\" parameter instead, following the instructions there.", "type": "line", "example": "fr", "suggested": true }, "flag": { "label": "Flag", "description": "A flag for the ethnic group", "type": "wiki-file-name" }, "flag_caption": { "label": "Flag caption", "description": "A caption for the flag", "type": "string" }, "rawimage": { "label": "raw image", "type": "wiki-file-name" }, "image": { "label": "Image", "type": "wiki-file-name" }, "image_caption": { "aliases": [ "caption" ], "label": "image caption" }, "population": { "aliases": [ "pop", "total", "total1" ], "label": "Population", "type": "number" }, "total_ref": {}, "genealogy": { "label": "Ethnic population", "description": "Population including ancestral descent", "type": {{Documentation subpage}} {{warning |Articles about ethnic groups or similarly large human populations should not be illustrated by a [[photomontage]] or [[Wikipedia:Picture tutorial#Galleries|gallery of images]] of group members; see [[MOS:PEOPLEGALLERY]] }}{{High-use}} {{auto short description}} {{Lua|Module:Infobox|Module:InfoboxImage|Module:Check for unknown parameters}} == Syntax == === Basic usage === {{Parameter names example |group |native_name |image |image_alt |image_caption |total |total_year |total_source |total_ref={{{total_ref}}} |genealogy |regions |languages |religions = | total_ref = | genealogy = | regions = | languages = | religions = | related_groups = | footnotes = }} === Usage with detailed per-region population === {{Parameter names example |group revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24938264069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{warning |Articles about ethnic groups or similarly large human populations should not be illustrated by a [[photomontage]] or [[Wikipedia:Picture tutorial#Galleries|gallery of images]] of group members; see [[MOS:PEOPLEGALLERY]] }}{{High-use}} {{auto short description}} {{Lua|Module:Infobox|Module:InfoboxImage|Module:Check for unknown parameters}} == Syntax == === Basic usage === {{Parameter names example |group |native_name |image |image_alt |image_caption |total |total_year |total_source |total_ref={{{total_ref}}} |genealogy |regions |languages |religions |related_groups |footnotes }} {{Infobox ethnic group | group = | native_name = | native_name_lang = | image = | image_caption = | image_alt = | image_upright = | total = | total_year = | total_source = | total_ref = | genealogy = | regions = | languages = | religions = | related_groups = | footnotes = }} === Usage with detailed per-region population === {{Parameter names example |group |native_name |image |image_alt|image_caption |total |total_year |total_source |total_ref={{{total_ref}}}|total1 |total1_year |total1_source |total1_ref |genealogy |regions |languages |religions |related_groups |footnotes |region1 |pop1 |ref1={{{ref1}}} |region2 |pop2 |ref2={{{ref2}}} |region3 |pop3 |ref3={{{ref3}}} |pop4=............ |region33 |pop33 |ref33={{{ref33}}} }} {{Infobox ethnic group | group = | native_name = | native_name_lang = | image = | image_caption = | image_alt = | image_uprigh = | total = | total_year = | total_source = | total_ref = | total1 = | total1_year = | total1_source = | total1_ref = | genealogy = | regions = | region1 = | pop1 = | ref1 = | region2 = | pop2 = | ref2 = | region3 = | pop3 = | ref3 = | languages = | religions = | related_groups = | footnotes = }} == Example == {{Infobox ethnic group | group = Tajiks | native_name = {{lang|tgk|size=115%|تاجيک}} {{lang|tg|size=90%|Тоҷик}} | image = Thomas Edward Gordon Lake Victoria, Great Pamir, May 2nd, 1874.png | image_alt = Thomas Edward Gordon Lake Victoria, Great Pamir, May 2nd, 1874 | image_upright = 1.2 | population = {{circa}} 16.5 to 28.5 million | region1 = Afghanistan | pop1 = 8,400,000 | ref1 = [https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/afghanistan CIA - The World Factbook - Afghanistan] | region2 = Tajikistan | pop2 = 5,849,331 | ref2 = [https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/tajikistan CIA - The World Factbook - Tajikistan] | region3 = Uzbekistan | pop3 = {{Unbulleted list |class=nowrap | 1,365,356[https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/uzbekistan CIA - The World Factbook - Uzbekistan] | or 4,915,284[http://www.state.gov/g/drl/rls/hrrpt/1999/369.htm US Department of State Report] | or 11,000,000D. Carlson, ''Uzbekistan: Ethnic Composition and Discriminations'', [[:en:Harvard University|Harvard University]], August 2003. }} | region4 = Iran | pop4 = 1,700,000 | ref4 = | region5 = Pakistan | pop5 = 900,000 | ref5 = | region6 = Russia | pop6 = 500,000 | ref6 = | region7 = Germany | pop7 = 120,000 | ref7 = | region8 = United States | pop8 = 93,000 | ref8 = | region9 = Qatar | pop9 = 87,000 | ref9 = | region10 = China (PRC) | pop10 = 41,000 | ref10 = | region11 = Ukraine | pop11 = 419 | ref11 = [http://2001.ukrcensus.gov.ua/results/nationality_population/nationality_popul1/select_5/?botton=cens_db&box=5.1W&k_t=00&p=75&rz=1_1&rz_b=2_1%20%20%20&n_page=4 State statistics committee of Ukraine - National composition of population, 2001 census] (Ukrainian)[http://www.state.gov/g/drl/rls/hrrpt/1999/369.htm US Department of State Report]D. Carlson, ''"Uzbekistan: Ethnic Composition and Discriminations"'', [[:en:Harvard University|Harvard University]], August 2003 | languages = [[Persian language|Persian]] (varieties of [[Dari (Eastern Persian)|Dari]] and [[Tajik language|Tajik]]) | religions = [[:en:Islam|Islam]] (mostly [[Sunni]]) | related_groups = Other [[Iranian peoples]] | footnotes = ''Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet...''
{{reflist}} }} {{Infobox ethnic group | group = Tajiks | native_name = {{lang|tgk|size=115%|تاجيک}} {{lang|tg|size=90%|Тоҷик}} | image = Thomas Edward Gordon Lake Victoria, Great Pamir, May 2nd, 1874.png | image_alt = Thomas Edward Gordon Lake Victoria, Great Pamir, May 2nd, 1874 | image_upright = 1.2 | population = {{circa}} 16.5 to 28.5 million | region1 = Afghanistan | pop1 = 8,400,000 | ref1 = [https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/afghanistan CIA - The World Factbook - Afghanistan] | region2 = Tajikistan | pop2 = 5,849,331 | ref2 = [https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/tajikistan CIA - The World Factbook - Tajikistan] | region3 = Uzbekistan | pop3 = {{Unbulleted list |class=nowrap | 1,365,356[https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/uzbekistan CIA - The World Factbook - Uzbekistan] | or 4,915,284[http://www.state.gov/g/drl/rls/hrrpt/1999/369.htm US Department of State Report] | or 11,000,000D. Carlson, ''Uzbekistan: Ethnic Composition and Discriminations'', [[:en:Harvard University|Harvard University]], August 2003. }} | region4 = Iran | pop4 = 1,700,000 | ref4 = | region5 = Pakistan | pop5 = 900,000 | ref5 = | region6 = Russia | pop6 = 500,000 | ref6 = | region7 = Germany | pop7 = 120,000 | ref7 = | region8 = United States | pop8 = 93,000 | ref8 = | region9 = Qatar | pop9 = 87,000 | ref9 = | region10 = China (PRC) | pop10 = 41,000 | ref10 = | region11 = Ukraine | pop11 = 419 | ref11 = [http://2001.ukrcensus.gov.ua/results/nationality_population/nationality_popul1/select_5/?botton=cens_db&box=5.1W&k_t=00&p=75&rz=1_1&rz_b=2_1%20%20%20&n_page=4 State statistics committee of Ukraine - National composition of population, 2001 census] (Ukrainian)[http://www.state.gov/g/drl/rls/hrrpt/1999/369.htm US Department of State Report]D. Carlson, ''"Uzbekistan: Ethnic Composition and Discriminations"'', [[:en:Harvard University|Harvard University]], August 2003 | languages = [[Persian language|Persian]] (varieties of [[Dari (Eastern Persian)|Dari]] and [[Tajik language|Tajik]]) | religions = [[:en:Islam|Islam]] (mostly [[Sunni]]) | related_groups = Other [[Iranian peoples]] | footnotes = ''Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet...''
{{reflist}} }} {{clear right}} == Parameters == All parameters optional except ''group''. {| class="wikitable" ! Parameter !! Description |- |width="95px"| ''group'' || Name of the group (e.g., "Armenians"). |- | ''native_name'' || Name in local language. If more than one, separate using {{tl|Plain list}} |- | ''native_name_lang'' || [[:en:en:List of ISO 639-2 codes|ISO 639-2 code]], e.g., "fr" for French. If more than one, use {{tl|lang}} instead |- | ''flag'' || To specify a flag image below the titlebar; see below for example. Please be cautious about using this: most ethnic groups do ''not'' have a strongly associated flag. |- | ''flag_border'' || set to no to suppress the thin border around the flag image. |- | ''flag_caption'' || Caption to be placed below flag (if used). |- | ''flag_alt'' || Alt caption to be placed on flag image, per [[WP:ACCIM]]. |- | ''image'' || To specify an image below the titlebar (or flag); see below for example. |- | ''image_caption'' || (or ''caption'') Caption to be placed below image (if used). |- | ''image_alt'' || Alt caption to be placed on image, per [[WP:ACCIM]]. |- | ''total'' || (or ''population'' or ''pop'') Worldwide population. |- | ''genealogy'' || Worldwide population under criteria, including assimilated diasporas (useful to distinguish from ''population'' for certain ethnicities). |- | ''regions'' || (or ''popplace'') To introduce and/or indicate regional populations. |- | ''tablehdr'' || Heading above list of regions (region1, region2, etc.). |- | ''region1'' || To list first region. Requires {{para|pop1}} or {{para|ref1}}. |- | ''pop1'' || To list population in first region. |- | ''ref1'' || To list footnote/s and/or URL/s for first region's information. |- | ''region2'' ||rowspan="3"| Ditto second region. |- | ''pop2'' |- | ''ref2'' |- | ...... || |- | ''region40'' ||rowspan="3"| Ditto fortiest (and, currently, last) region. |- | ''pop40'' |- | ''ref40'' |- | ''languages'' || (or ''langs'') List of languages spoken by group. |- | ''religions'' || (or ''rels'') List of group's religious affiliations. |- | ''related_groups'' || List of other ethnic groups related to the group. |- | ''footnotes'' || List of footnotes |} ===Example use of ''flag'' and ''image'' parameters=== {{smaller|(''flag'' and ''flag_caption'' for [[:en:Basque people|Basque people]], ''image'' and ''image_caption'' for [[Zulu people|Zulu]] people)}} |flag = Flag of the Basque Country.svg |flag_caption = The [[Ikurriña]], flag of the [[Basque Country]] |flag_alt = The Ikurriña, flag of the Basque Country |image = ZuluWarriors.jpg |image_caption = Zulu warriors (late nineteenth century) |image_alt = Zulu warriors (late nineteenth century) == Microformat == {{UF-hcard-org}} == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Infobox template for an ethnic group", "format": "{{_\n| ________________ = _\n}}\n", "params": { "group": { "label": "Name", "description": "The name of the ethnic group. Defaults to the page name if empty.", "type": "string", "example": "Armenians", "default": "{{PAGENAME}}", "suggested": true }, "native_name": { "label": "Native name", "description": "The name of the ethnic group in the local language. If there is more than one, enter each using the following templates: {{Plainlist|*{{lang|ISO 639-2 code (e.g., \"fr\")|First name}} *{{lang|ISO code|Second name}} etc.}}.", "type": "content", "suggested": true }, "native_name_lang": { "label": "Native name language code", "description": "ISO 639-2 code (e.g., \"fr\" for French) for the language of the native name, if there is only one. If there is more than one, use just the \"Native name\" parameter instead, following the instructions there.", "type": "line", "example": "fr", "suggested": true }, "flag": { "label": "Flag", "description": "A flag for the ethnic group", "type": "wiki-file-name" }, "flag_caption": { "label": "Flag caption", "description": "A caption for the flag", "type": "string" }, "rawimage": { "label": "raw image", "type": "wiki-file-name" }, "image": { "label": "Image", "type": "wiki-file-name" }, "image_caption": { "aliases": [ "caption" ], "label": "image caption" }, "population": { "aliases": [ "pop", "total", "total1" ], "label": "Population", "type": "number" }, "total_ref": {}, "genealogy": { "label": "Ethnic population", "description": "Population including ancestral descent", "type": "number" }, "total_year": {}, "total_source": { "label": "Population source", "description": "\"census\" or \"estimate\"", "example": "census", "type": "string" }, "total1_year": {}, "total1_source": {}, "total1_ref": {}, "total2_year": {}, "total2_source": {}, "total2": {}, "total2_ref": {}, "total3_year": {}, "total3_source": {}, "total3": {}, "total3_ref": {}, "popplace": {}, "regions": {},
